project.name: Litux
project.purpose: Document, validate, and standardize all mathematical, statistical, and econometric logic used by Litux estimator engines.
principles: Every estimator must be validated against R, Stata, or Python before UI release

implemented: normal, t, binomial, poisson, chi-squared distributions
risks_or_missing: Expression evaluator uses new Function and should be sandbox-reviewed before untrusted production use
Distribution functions need golden tests against R for a grid of values
Integration is composite Simpson, not adaptive Simpson despite header wording

implemented: Poisson fixed effects / PPML with entity FE
risks_or_missing: No standard non-FE Poisson exported as separate estimator
Poisson FE currently handles one fixed-effect dimension only
No explicit separation detection/removal comparable to ppmlhdfe
No offset/exposure support yet
No two-way FE Poisson yet
Need validation against glm/fixest/ppmlhdfe
This is linear IV-GMM, not general nonlinear GMM
No one-step/iterated/CUE modes exposed
J-stat p-value uses Wilson-Hilferty approximation; validate against chi-square CDF
No HAC weighting matrix yet
Need validation against R gmm, Stata gmm, statsmodels IVGMM

implemented: Sharp RDD with local linear WLS
risks_or_missing: Sharp RDD is local linear only; no p/q polynomial order generalization
No robust bias correction like rdrobust
IK bandwidth is approximate and should be labeled as such unless validated
No rdplot bin-selection equivalent yet
Fuzzy RDD SE should be validated against rdrobust/Stata
No Callaway-Santanna, Sun-Abraham, TWFE, or Synthetic Control in this file

implementation_backlog.reason: Claude Code needs a stable contract before touching estimator math.
Current engines return different result shapes.

implementation_backlog.task: Add golden tests for calcEngine distributions against R
implementation_backlog.reason: Probability functions are used by p-values and CI logic.

implementation_backlog.task: Split Poisson into poisson_mle, poisson_ppml, poisson_fe
implementation_backlog.reason: Current implementation has FE PPML but not clean standard Poisson API.

implementation_backlog.task: Upgrade RDD to support rdrobust-style p/q, bandwidth, kernels, bins, and robust bias correction
implementation_backlog.reason: Current RDD is useful but not equivalent to rdrobust.
Needed before Sun-Abraham, Callaway-Santanna, and high-dimensional FE models.
